Spanish regulator supports Almaraz licence extension
items.summary: Spain's Nuclear Safety Council has issued a favourable report on the renewal of the operating licence for the two-unit Almaraz nuclear power plant. It says the plant meets the…

items.title: European Investment Bank agrees to Cernavoda refurb loan
items.summary: A loan of EUR800 million (USD914 million) for the refurbishment of Romania's Cernavoda Nuclear Power Plant’s unit 1 has been approved by the European Investment Bank.
